title: Update Semantic Type
content:
# Update Semantic Type

Updates an existing Semantic Type with any new values passed through the body parameters. All body parameters are optional and if not provided will remain unchanged.

## Endpoint

`POST /datastreams/semantic-types/{semantic_type_name}/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.datastreams.updateDataStreamSemanticType()
print(response)

parameters.name: semantic_type_name
parameters.description: Semantic Type key `name` to get. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

title.description: Display name (`title`) of the Semantic Type.

created.description: UTC time when the Semantic Type was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Semantic Type.

title.description: Display name (`title`) of the Semantic Type.

updated.description: UTC time when any Semantic Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
